initiatives.name: Joy Bomb Social Center
initiatives.description: A radical community space fostering mutual aid and collective liberation through art, education, and organizing in Gary. They coordinate resource sharing, political education, and solidarity networks while building power through community gatherings, skill-sharing workshops, and creating accessible spaces for movement building and cultural resistance.

initiatives.name: Cooperation NWI
initiatives.description: The mission of Cooperation Northwest Indiana is building a brighter future in the ruins of the rust belt.

initiatives.name: BLM Gary
initiatives.description: Since 2014. Black-led, multiracial, inter-generational organization rooted in Gary, active in Northwest Indiana region.
